manifest.name: Native Cursor

name: Native Cursor

releases.author: olivertedwards
releases.description:
A minimal Obsidian plugin that replaces the default editor cursor with a wider, coloured, and optionally blinking one; no movement animations, no blur, just a cleaner cursor that’s easier to spot.

**What’s included:**
- Cursor width slider (1–6px)
- Separate colour pickers for dark and light mode
- Blink toggle; keep the standard idle blink or turn it off entirely
- Reset to defaults button
- No movement animation; instant, native feel

**Notes:**
- Styling applies to the main editor only (source and live preview). The note title, frontmatter, and search inputs use native browser carets which don’t support width styling.
- Tested on Obsidian 1.4.0 and later, desktop and mobile.

**Full changelog:** [First release; no previous version.](https://github.com/olivertedwards/native-cursor-obsidian/commits/v1.0.0)
